step_rationale: LDL clearance and uptake regulation; LDLR deficiency causes hypercholesterolemia and early atherosclerosis.
mechanism: LDLR mediates LDL endocytosis; mutations impair LDL clearance, driving lipid retention and accelerated atherogenesis.
